calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Javier Puentes, general manager for the Tenderloin Housing Clinic, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Tony Dawson.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 18, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 01/16/08-----------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, and against defendant JOE SMITH as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic shall recover from defendant TONY DAWSON Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $1,806.71, Costs in the amount of 195.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic in the amount of $2,001.71.
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2791 Sixteenth Street, #64, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Off Calendar
